name: Cornmeal Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (moderate).
2. Lightly grease baking sheet.
3. Heat water, margarine, and seasonings in a saucepan until boiling.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in cornmeal and mix well until combined.
5. Divide dough into 30 portions using about 1 teaspoon per portion.
6. Roll each portion into a ball about 3/4 inch in diameter.
7. Place balls on baking sheet, about 3 inches apart.
8. Cover with wax paper and press with the bottom of a glass until very thin, about 2-1/2 inches in diameter. Remove wax paper.
9. Bake until lightly browned and crisp, about 15 minutes.
10. Cool on rack. Store in an airtight container.
